title: Catch Policy, Injected Randomness, Immutable Collection State, and Updates · Inference Brief: Pokedex Ts Catch Reducer Tests
summary: Catch calls Math.random inside the handler, mutates a Map in shared state, stores transport objects, accepts duplicate names with different casing, and cannot replay outcomes. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts catch reducer tests increment in replayable immutable Pokemon collection reducer. Learners progress through predict…
objectives: Prove threshold boundaries, duplicate, changed identity, lookup failure, abort, replay, and previous-state immutability.
Key entries by validated resolved ID and retain canonical name, detail view, catch evidence, and schema version.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
